failures.description: The required catalog search dependency timed out, preventing the agent from retrieving the product evidence needed to answer the question.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent correctly understood the user's goal and made the appropriate ProductCatalogSearch call with the needed filters. At index 3, the tool returned an explicit infrastructure/connectivity-style error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError, stating the catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms. This is not a malformed invocation, access block, or reasoning error. The failure was not resolved later; the agent only reported inability to complete.
